degraded.condition: unit/e2e not_run; performance layer N/A despite touches_build
degraded.reason: Docs + tooling iterate (README/CONTRIBUTING/SECURITY text, .github issue templates, +1 server npm script). No source logic changed. The one tooling claim (server typecheck script) was verified directly: npm run typecheck -> tsc --noEmit exit 0. touches_build fired on server/package.json but the change adds a backend script only — no bundle or dev_url impact — so the Lighthouse/bundle performance layer is not applicable.

surface_verification.justification: Docs + tooling launch-prep iterate; no startable runtime surface changed.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Five acceptance behaviors: (1) README Beta badge + maturity callout + report-issue link, (2) CONTRIBUTING/SECURITY maturity wording aligned to Beta, (3) README documents the two-workspace npm-per-package install, (4) valid GitHub issue forms + config, (5) a working server typecheck script.
test_completeness.justification: Docs + tooling change; each behavior verified by a deterministic probe (grep / YAML-schema validation / running the new npm script). 5 acceptance behaviors, 5 covered.

behaviors.behavior: README shows a Beta status badge, a maturity callout, and a link to file an issue
behaviors.evidence: grep confirms the shields.io status-beta-blue badge on README line 3 and the Beta callout with the issues/new/choose link.

behaviors.behavior: CONTRIBUTING.md and SECURITY.md maturity wording reads Beta, not Early Access
behaviors.evidence: git grep 'Early Access' returns only a historical compliance change-history row and one incidental code comment; neither CONTRIBUTING.md nor SECURITY.md carries the Early Access maturity label any more (both now say beta).

behaviors.behavior: README documents the two-workspace, no-root-package.json npm-per-package install with npm ci
behaviors.evidence: grep confirms the new note at README line 100 (cd server && npm ci, then cd client && npm ci).

behaviors.behavior: GitHub issue intake offers valid bug + feature forms and a config (blank issues off, docs + private-security contact links)
behaviors.evidence: PyYAML schema validation passed: bug_report.yml (7 fields, 3 required, valid field types), feature_request.yml (4 fields), config.yml (blank_issues_enabled present, 2 contact links).

behaviors.behavior: the server workspace has a working typecheck script
behaviors.evidence: Ran npm run typecheck in server/ (node_modules junctioned from the main tree): tsc --noEmit exited 0. Mirrors CI's already-gated npx tsc --noEmit.
